produces: host.js — Stream Dock host WebSocket client + event dispatcher
rationale: Implements per probe-ip1 findings. Argument parsing follows the documented host-launch convention (--port/--pluginUUID/--registerEvent). drawText sends both setTitle and setFeedback because the exact host-protocol field for Touch Bar widget text is external_source_unreachable (S1.A3, IP3.A1); both event names are documented in the canonical SDK and the host silently ignores payloads it does not recognize on a given Action target. See state/inline-deviations/dev-001.json.
